summary: Bill due colours, double-click details, iCloud sync fixes, and CloudKit schema deploy tooling.

introduced: Bill row colours ramp from green to orange as the due date approaches, red when overdue
Double-click a bill row to open its detail sheet
changed: Next due column shows relative timing and the formatted due date together
Bills and deletions queue for iCloud export on launch and after delete
CloudKit schema scripts now include CD_BillRecord and CD_BillPaymentRecord
fixed: Existing bills on one Mac were not always uploaded to iCloud on app launch
